description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of brick and concrete textures, with large glass windows and sliding doors providing ample natural light. The house includes a rooftop terrace with outdoor furniture and greenery, as well as a ground-level patio shaded by umbrellas. There is a driveway with a parked car, a small garden area with trees and shrubs, and a basketball hoop near the main entrance. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The main entryway is accentuated by a glass door, a small overhang, and a paved walkway leading up to it.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, rooftop terrace, and landscaped outdoor areas. The exterior combines brick, concrete, and glass for a sleek, contemporary look.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with a driveway, a parked car, a large tree, and the rooftop terrace with outdoor seating.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front facade with the main entryway, large windows, a shaded patio, and landscaped lawn.
description_view_2: This view displays the opposite side with a carport, umbrella-shaded patio, and a clear view of the rooftop garden and terrace.
description_view_3: This view presents the main entrance, basketball hoop, paved driveway, and a prominent tree in the front yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Glass door with a small overhang, paved walkway, and adjacent basketball hoop; no porch or columns
